utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each item is fully specified with coverage details and both monthly and annual costs. The total_budget section also provides a complete cost breakdown with monthly and annual totals, previous spending, savings, and activation date. Therefore, all 5 out of 5 required items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan shows four LifeFirst products: health_coverage (LifeFirst), property_coverage (LifeFirst), travel_coverage (LifeFirst), and additional_services (LifeFirst). In the ground-truth ratings, the relevant entries are: LifeFirst Standard Plan under primary_health_coverage (physical_health rating 8, mental_health rating 8), LifeFirst Standard Coverage under property_protection.home_content (rating 8), and LifeFirst Standard Plan under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance (rating 7). The additional_services section corresponds to concierge and premium membership type services, which align with the 'Premium Insurance Membership' rating 10 in the general_services section since it includes concierge and premium membership benefits. Therefore, we map each LifeFirst item in the final coverage plan to these ratings accordingly.
